pageTitle: Help Us Lay Mrs Rose Joshua to Rest
pageDescription: A fundraiser to support the funeral arrangements for Mrs Rose Joshua.

zelle.instructions: Include your name in the memo.

shareMessage: Please help us lay Mrs Rose Joshua to rest. Every contribution, big or small, means the world to our family.
story: Our beloved Mrs Rose Joshua passed away and left behind a family that is grieving deeply. We are reaching out to our community for support during this difficult time.
The funds raised will go directly toward funeral arrangements, burial costs, and ensuring that Mrs Rose Joshua receives a dignified farewell surrounded by love.
Every contribution, no matter the size, means the world to us. Thank you for standing with our family in this moment of loss.
